zh.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw於1202年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。她和Reginald de la Schaw至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw于1202年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。她和Reginald de la Schaw至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Schaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for a herdsman, from Middle High German schāf, schāp ‘sheep’.

variants.name: Schaaf
meanings: Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from schaaf ‘plane’. Compare Vanderschaaf 2.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw was born in 1202, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. She had at least 1 son with Reginald de la Schaw. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw est née en 1202, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Reginald de la Schaw. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw wurde 1202 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hatte mit Reginald de la Schaw mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw è nata il nel 1202 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Reginald de la Schaw. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schawは1202年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで生まれた。彼女はReginald de la Schawとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw(은)는 1202년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Reginald de la Schaw(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw nasceu em 1202, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Reginald de la Schaw. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw родилась в 1202 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Reginald de la Schaw. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Reginald De La Schaw nació en 1202, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Reginald de la Schaw. Murió en su pueblo.
